# Conventions

All `.md` files have YAML frontmatter with: id, title, domain, type, version, status, language, created, modified, author, copyright, license, summary, platforms.

- URL-based domain identifiers: `agentic-cookbook://guidelines/testing/test-pyramid`
- Named requirements use kebab-case
- Version is semver
- MIT license on all files
